hero.name: Dr. Atoshe Islam
hero.description: A lot of people put off dental visits because they are nervous or unsure. I get that. My goal is to make sure you leave feeling better than when you came in — no rush, no jargon, just honest care.

about.title: Hi, I'm Dr. Atoshe Islam
about.subtitle: A dental surgeon who actually listens
about.bio: I became a dentist because I believe everyone deserves to smile without pain or embarrassment. After completing my BDS at the University of Dhaka and postgraduate training in Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery at Dhaka Dental College, I opened my practice with one simple idea — treat every patient the way I'd want my own family treated. I take time to explain what is happening, answer your questions, and make sure you are comfortable before we begin anything.
about.qual2: PGT — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Dhaka Dental College
about.qual3: Registered with the Bangladesh Medical & Dental Council
about.expDesc: Whether it is a routine cleaning or a complex surgery, I give each patient my full attention. I work across two clinics in Dhaka so you can choose whichever location is easier for you.

services.title: How I Can Help You
services.subtitle: From a simple clean to complex surgery — all under one roof
services.ctaTitle: Not sure which treatment you need?
services.ctaSubtitle: Just come in and we will figure it out together. No pressure, no obligation.

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.desc: Missing a tooth can affect how you eat, speak, and feel about yourself. Implants are the closest thing to a real tooth — and they last a lifetime with proper care.

wisdom.name: Wisdom Tooth Removal
wisdom.desc: Nervous about having a tooth pulled? You are not alone. I will explain exactly what to expect, keep you comfortable throughout, and make sure the recovery is as smooth as possible.

rootCanal.name: Root Canal Treatment
rootCanal.desc: Root canals have a scary reputation — but most patients tell me it was much easier than they expected. The goal is simple: save your tooth and stop the pain.

cosmetic.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.desc: Whether you want whiter teeth, a chipped tooth fixed, or a full smile makeover — I will help you get results that look natural, not overdone.

oralSurgery.name: Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
oralSurgery.desc: For more complex problems involving the jaw, face, or mouth, my postgraduate surgical training means you are in experienced hands from start to finish.

checkup.name: Checkup & Cleaning
checkup.desc: The most overlooked part of dental care — and the most valuable. A regular visit catches small problems before they become expensive ones.

whyUs.title: What Patients Tell Me Matters
whyUs.subtitle: The things people mention most when they come back

qualified.title: I Explain Everything
qualified.desc: Before I do anything, I walk you through exactly what is happening and why. No surprises. You make the call.

bmdc.title: Properly Qualified
bmdc.desc: Fully registered with the BMDC (Reg. No: 16100) and trained in oral surgery at Dhaka Dental College. You are not taking a risk.

sterilization.title: Spotlessly Clean
sterilization.desc: Every instrument is sterilized before your appointment. I follow the same infection-control standards you would expect at any serious medical facility.

comfort.title: No Unnecessary Pain
comfort.desc: Pain management is something I take seriously. If something is going to hurt, I tell you beforehand and we sort it out together.

testimonials.title: What Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real words from people who came back

t1.name: Rahim Uddin
t1.text: I had been putting off my root canal for two years because I was terrified. Dr. Islam sat with me for five minutes before starting and explained everything. I barely felt a thing.

t2.name: Nasreen Akter
t2.text: My wisdom tooth was killing me for weeks. After the removal, the doctor called the next day to check on me. That kind of follow-up — you do not get that everywhere.

t3.name: Shafiqul Islam
t3.text: My kids used to cry at the dentist. Now they actually ask when we are going back. That says everything about how Dr. Islam treats his patients.

appointment.pageSubtitle: We are here every day from 10 AM to 3 PM
appointment.title: Book Your Visit
appointment.subtitle: Fill in the form and we will confirm a time that works for you
appointment.name: Your Name

appointment.noteText: We will call or WhatsApp you to confirm your slot. If you are nervous about anything, just mention it and we will make sure to address it.
appointment.success: Great — we have got your request! Expect a call or WhatsApp from us shortly to confirm the time.
appointment.error: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again or reach us directly on WhatsApp.
